task_completion.description: Verify the vacancy is created with the correct name and job title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vacancy list or details page showing the Vacancy Name as 'HR Manager - East Regional Office' and the Job Title as 'HR Manager'.

task_completion.description: Verify the vacancy has the correct hiring manager and number of positions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the vacancy details or creation form showing 'Sarah Johnson' in the Hiring Manager field and '2' in the Number of Positions field.

task_completion.description: Verify the candidate is added with the correct first and last name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a candidate list or profile page showing the name 'Rebecca Martinez'.

task_completion.description: Verify the candidate has the correct email and phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the candidate's contact details showing the email 'rebecca.martinez@email.com' and the phone number '555-018-7234'.

task_completion.description: Verify the candidate is assigned to the correct vacancy and consent to keep data is recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the candidate's application record showing they are linked to the 'HR Manager - East Regional Office' vacancy, and a checked box or status indicating 'Consent to keep data'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser interface showing the HR management system. There should be no terminal windows executing curl, python, or database commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a functional web application (likely an HR system like OrangeHRM), not a text editor, notes app, or static mock page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the target values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The vacancy must be named exactly 'HR Manager - East Regional Office' with job title 'HR Manager', hiring manager 'Sarah Johnson', and 2 positions. The candidate must be named 'Rebecca Martinez' with email 'rebecca.martinez@email.com' and phone '555-018-7234'. The candidate must be assigned to the created vacancy and have 'consent to keep data' recorded.
